messages.content: You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como criar Block Volume e attachar a instância OCI via Terraform?

Block Volume:

**1. Crie o volume:**
```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume" "data" {
  compartment_id      = var.compartment_ocid
  availability_domain = "QnsQ:US-ASHBURN-AD-1"
  display_name        = "data-volume-01"
  size_in_gbs         = 500
}
```

**2. Attache:**
```hcl
resource "oci_core_volume_attachment" "attach" {
  attachment_type = "paravirtualized"
  compartment_id  = var.compartment_ocid
  instance_id     = oci_core_instance.app.id
  volume_id       = oci_core_volume.data.id
}
```

**3. Monte via cloud-init:** mkfs.ext4 /dev/oraclevi/oraclevi && mount /data

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como criar bucket Object Storage com lifecycle rules via Terraform?

Object Storage com lifecycle:

```hcl
resource "oci_objectstorage_bucket" "app" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  namespace      = var.namespace
  name           = "app-data-bucket"
  access_type    = "NoPublicAccess"
}

resource "oci_objectstorage_object_lifecycle_policy" "lifecycle" {
  bucket    = oci_objectstorage_bucket.app.name
  namespace = var.namespace
  rules {
    name       = "archive-old-logs"
    is_enabled = true
    action     = "ARCHIVE"
    time_amount = 90
    time_unit  = "DAYS"
  }
  rules {
    name       = "delete-temp"
    is_enabled = true
    action     = "DELETE"
    time_amount = 30
    time_unit  = "DAYS"
  }
}
```

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs

You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como resolver erro de compartment quota ao criar Block Volume?

Troubleshooting de quota:

**1. Verifique:** oci limits value list --service-name blockstorage

**2. Soluções:**
- Solicite aumento: Console → Limits, Quotas and Usage
- Libere espaço: delete volumes não utilizados
- Use outro availability domain (quotas são por AD)

**3. Prevenção:** Monitore com OCI Monitoring, alarms em 80%

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs

Como configurar encryption de Block Volumes com OCI Vault?
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como importar storage existente para o state do Terraform?

Importar storage:

```bash
# Bucket
terraform import oci_objectstorage_bucket.imported n/namespace/b/bucket-name

# Block Volume
terraform import oci_core_volume.imported <volume-ocid>

# Volume Attachment
terraform import oci_core_volume_attachment.imported <attachment-ocid>

# File System
terraform import oci_file_storage_file_system.imported <filesystem-ocid>
```

Após import, complete .tf com atributos do state e valide com terraform plan

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como troubleshootar volume não attachando a instância?

Troubleshooting:

**1. Verifique:** oci compute volume-attachment get --volume-attachment-id <ocid>

**2. Problemas comuns:**
- Volume já attachado: detache primeiro
- AD diferente: volume e instância devem estar no mesmo AD
- Instância não RUNNING

**3. iSCSI manual:**
```bash
sudo iscsiadm -m node -T <iqn> -p <ip>:3260 -l
```

**4. Paravirtualized vs iSCSI:** Paravirtualized é mais simples (recomendado)

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como gerenciar pre-authenticated requests (PAR) para Object Storage?

PARs para acesso temporário:

```hcl
resource "oci_objectstorage_preauthrequest" "upload" {
  namespace   = var.namespace
  bucket      = oci_objectstorage_bucket.app.name
  name        = "temp-upload"
  access_type = "AnyObjectWrite"
  time_expires = "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z"
}

resource "oci_objectstorage_preauthrequest" "download" {
  namespace   = var.namespace
  bucket      = oci_objectstorage_bucket.app.name
  name        = "temp-download"
  access_type = "ObjectRead"
  object_name = "reports/file.pdf"
  time_expires = "2026-06-30T23:59:59Z"
}
```

**Access types:** ObjectRead, ObjectWrite, AnyObjectRead, AnyObjectWrite

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI Terraform specialist with expertise in storage resources. Provide technical guidance on block volume, object storage, and file storage.
Como configurar versioning de objetos no Object Storage via Terraform?

Versioning de objetos:

```hcl
resource "oci_objectstorage_bucket" "versioned" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_ocid
  namespace      = var.namespace
  name           = "versioned-bucket"
  versioning     = "Enabled"  # Enabled, Disabled, ou Suspended
}
```

**Operações:**
- List versões: oci os object list --bucket-name bucket --versions
- Delete versão específica: oci os object delete --version-id <id>
- Restore: oci os object get --version-id <id>

**Use cases:** Proteção contra deleção acidental, compliance, auditoria

Doc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
